hypotheses.title: B2 Is a Genuine Book Cipher
hypotheses.key_evidence: Fabrication score 0.00, decode accuracy 96.6%, serial correlation 0.044

hypotheses.title: B1 and B3 Are Sequential-Gibberish Fabrications
hypotheses.key_evidence: Chi-squared B1=50.9, B3=57.8 (threshold 44.3), IC below English

hypotheses.title: Same Fabricator Created B1 and B3
hypotheses.key_evidence: 12D bootstrap cognitive feature test, shared scanning bias

hypotheses.title: B3 Was Fabricated Before B1
hypotheses.key_evidence: B3 serial correlation 0.612 > B1 0.252, Gillogly only in B1

hypotheses.title: The Gillogly Sequence Was Deliberately Planted
hypotheses.key_evidence: Monte Carlo P < 10^-5, non-monotone numbers produce monotone letters

hypotheses.title: Beale Used a Dunlap-Tradition DoI Edition
hypotheses.key_evidence: unalienable spelling, Y-word at 811, X-word at 1005

hypotheses.title: Ward Published Plaintext Contains 37 Expanded Abbreviations
hypotheses.key_evidence: NW alignment identifies exactly 37 extra characters

hypotheses.title: 22 B2 Mismatches Arise from 4 Systematic Sources
Ward Fabrication Time Was ~45 Minutes Total
B3 Q1 Does Not Contain Real Content
hypotheses.key_evidence: IC inconclusive, no recognizable patterns, Bayesian model rejects English
